title: eragrostis riparia
intro: Eragrostis riparia, also known as river grass or buffalo grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. This plant has been utilized for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various health issues such as fever, sore throats, and respiratory problems due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eragrostis riparia include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory function, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and made into tea or infused in hot water to extract its medicinal properties.
